notice: 1.3.7 remembers the construction + schedule names you type, and now checks your schedule names against HAP (like it does for constructions).
notes: 1.3.7 - (1) the app now REMEMBERS the construction and schedule names you type, so they stick across launches and are used everywhere (Check / Dry run / Push). (2) Check and Dry run now verify your schedule names against HAP (Lighting / Equipment / People / Misc), just like wall / window / roof constructions - a wrong name is flagged before you push. (3) the template's Walls and Spaces sheets explain: leave the construction columns blank to use your app defaults. Just click Update now.
